examples: Cao's papers are about graphene (石墨烯), the thinnest and strongest in the world.
He ran his greedy eyes over them, searching for the thinnest ones.
They were lined up in his workshop according to size, with the thinnest as thin as my pinky and the widest as thick as one of Hattie's braids.
At just 10.5mm thick, the BlackBerry Bold 9930 smartphone is the thinnest BlackBerry smartphone ever.
The road to the world's warmest, thinnest outdoor gear has been a long one.
